title: Growth Gateway: UK-Kenya green tech opportunities​
body: "This slide pack was produced by Boston Consulting Group for the Growth Gateway programme. It explores Kenya’s cold chain logistics market and its potential to transform food security and agricultural exports.  Designed for UK investors and trade stakeholders, the document highlights how the market is expected to grow to between £130 million to £250 million by 2030. This is due to increasing urbanisation, supportive regulation, and demand for outsourced solutions.  The document outlines investment pathways in cold-storage facilities, third-party logistics, and export infrastructure, while addressing affordability and infrastructure challenges that require blended finance and strategic partnerships.   Find out more about Growth Gateway.  "
